summary: Iteration 56 (Compliance Salary Process) end-to-end verified. Backend: 17/17 pytest cases pass, 1 skipped (needs seeded attendance to make gross ∈ (0, 21000] for ESIC-eligible-when-eligible assertion). Frontend: web portal /compliance-salary-run loads for super_admin with correct header 'Compliance Salary Process', subtitle 'PF · ESIC · PT · TDS — New labour-code wage base', structure defaults 40/20/5/3/32/0, statutory config PF cap 15000, PF (Emp) 12, ESIC ≤ ₹21000, Wage floor 50. Sidebar shows BOTH 'Salary process' and 'Compliance salary'. Configure employees modal opens with per-employee PF/ESIC switches, PT state, Basic ₹, TDS ₹ and a Save button. Generate compliance run renders the full results table (Code/Name/PD/Basic/HRA/Conv/Med/Spl/Others/Gross/Wage Base/PF(E)/PF(Er)/ESI(E)/ESI(Er)/PT/TDS/Ded/Net) with a TOTAL row. Admin dashboard tile (admin-compliance-salary-tile) navigates to /compliance-salary-run.
action_items: Optional: seed attendance for one employee so ESIC-eligible-when-eligible test asserts non-zero ESIC values (currently skipped).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is very large (~10113 lines) — consider modularizing into routers. Not blocking.

compliance_salary.compute_compliance_row correctly implements: stat_wage_base = max(basic, gross_paid * floor_pct/100); PF capped at pf_wage_cap; ESIC gated on gross ≤ esic_gross_threshold; PT via PT_STATE_MONTHLY; TDS from user.tds_amount.

success_rate.backend: 100% (17/17 executed cases pass; 1 conditional test skipped due to sparse attendance data — acceptable per problem statement)

seed_data_creation: PATCH on 2 employees (basic_amount=5000/25000, salary_monthly=50k/60k, pf/esic toggles, pt_state, tds) via /api/admin/user-role during tests. All within existing SKSCO1 company. No new users created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL) — https://emplo-connect-1.preview.emergentagent.com. OTP verify returns session_token (not token). Compliance run schema keys are canonical: rows[*] has stat_wage_base/pf_wages/pf_employee/pf_employer_epf/pf_employer_eps/pf_employer_total/esic_wage_base/esic_employee/esic_employer/pt_state/pt/tds/total_deduction/net + structure Basic/HRA/Conveyance/Medical/Special/Others. Generate-payslips response uses `payslips_count`. Frontend token is stored under localStorage key `llc_session_token`. To hit ESIC-eligible-when-eligible path, seed at least one attendance day so monthly_gross falls in (0, 21000] range.
